user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of agreement letter templates with their template type ID, letter type, and description, so that I can see all configured templates at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for Template Type ID, Letter type, Description, and Task

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open and view an individual letter template via the Task action, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When I click View on a template row; Then the selected letter template is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the letter templates list, so that I see the most up-to-date templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch between the Letter Templates, Certification Questionnaire, and Email Templates tabs, so that I can manage related agreement configurations from one place
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When I select the Certification Questionnaire or Email Templates tab; Then the corresponding configuration view is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the list and see how many items are displayed, so that I can navigate large sets of templates
acceptance_criteria: Given the Letter Templates list has multiple pages; When I click Next; Then the next page of templates is shown and the displayed item count is updated

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel out of the Letter Templates view, so that I can exit without making changes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When I click Cancel; Then I exit the view without saving changes
